title: verbascum × martini
intro: Verbascum × martini, also known as the Martini's mullein, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the mullein family, known for its large, showy flowers and tall, stately growth habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum × martini include reducing inflammation and soothing irritated tissues, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
